creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 211943
svn diff for editors/hexcurse

editors/hexcurse has been marked BROKEN as the
source location went missing.
The svn(1) diff(1) attached fixes that.

I went looking to add HEX capabilities to (a)ee
which I currently Maintain. I happened across hexcurse.
But found that it wouldn't fetch(1). So I managed to dredge
up the original source. I also discovered that the web page
has been gone for some 11yrs. So I whipped up a replacement.

CHANGES

Makefile
MASTER_SITES

distinfo
TIMESTAMP
DISTFILE (hexcurse-1.55.tar.gz)

pkg-descr
WWW
slight grammatical mods

That's it!

Tested on: FreeBSD 14.0-FUTURE Cray256

Thanks!

NOTE to current Maintainer: If you're un(willing|able) to
maintain this. Feel free to list me. I'll be happy to take it. :)

--Chris
